LAW AND MOTION 301, AT THE HEARING, MR. ALATRAQCHI WAS UNABLE TO PROVIDE A COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE BUT INSISTED THAT A PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN FILED. AFTER A THOROUGH SEARCHED BY THE CLERK, THE ORIGINAL WAS NOT FOUND IN THE FILE NOR ENTERED IN THE REGISTERED OF ACTION. THE COURT ORDERED THAT IF MR. ALATRAQCHI CAN PROVIDE A COPY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION, OTHERWISE THE MOTION WILL BE TAKEN OFF OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR. OFF THE RECORD, AT 11:30 AM PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED THE COURT WITH HIS COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF RASHID ALATRAQCHI'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME IN JUDGMENT. ORDER WAS SIGNED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PHA)

Off Calendar May-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Zanghi, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Mission-Capp Limited Partnership
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Mission-Capp Limited Partnership's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $493.75, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MISSION-CAPP LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S Motion To Vacate And/Or Set Aside The Default, Default Judgment, The Order Substituting The Partnership'S Name On The Default Judgment, And Recall The Writ IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 218. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Nichole Rodich CSR# 11604 =(301/PJB)

Hearing On Defendant'S Motion To Vacate And/Or Set Aside The Default, The Default Judgment, The Order Substitutin The Partnership'S Namone On The Default Judgment And Recall The Writ. Transferred From Department 301.
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been transferred from Department 301 for hearing on defendant's Motion to Vacate and/or Set Aside the Default the Default Judgment, the Order Substituting the Partnership's Name on the Default Judgment and to Recall the Writ of Executation.
Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Rashid Alatraqchi was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for defendant and moving party Mission-Capp Limited Partnership, erroneously sued as Leandero Soto Apartments.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant's motion, and the Default, Default Judgment, Order Substituting the Partnership's Name on the Default Judgment and to Recall the Writ of Executation are all hereby SET ASIDE.

Counsel for defendant shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than December 31, 2008.

Notice Of Motion To Correct Name In Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RASHID ALATRAQCHI, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)203-2130, PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, LEANDRO SOTO APARTMENTS

AT THE HEARING, MR. ALATRAQCHI WAS UNABLE TO PROVIDE A COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE BUT INSISTED THAT A PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN FILED. ALATRAQCHI CAN PROVIDE A COPY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION, OTHERWISE THE MOTION WILL BE TAKEN OFF OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR. OFF THE RECORD, AT 11:30 AM PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED THE COURT WITH HIS COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF RASHID ALATRAQCHI'S Motion To Correct Name In Judgment. ORDER WAS SIGNED. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PHA)

Ex Parte Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment(Resident)
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rashid Alatraqchi, Plaintiff appeared in Propria Persona.
No other appearances.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Rashid Alatraqchi's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied. Judgment has been entered. A Writ of Attachment is a pre-judgment remedy. No basis has been offered for the matter being heard as an ex parte application. Plaintiff must take action to collect the judgment, and the Writ of Attachment is not a collection action. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Plaintiff Rashid Alatraqchi was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Leandro Soto Apartments.
Default entered against defendant on January 31, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, August 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Rashid Alatraqchi, and against the Defaulted Defendant Leandro Soto Apartments as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,954.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $38,409.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
